name: ASRock IMB-1240-WV Mini-ITX Industrial Motherboard - Intel Q670 Chipset - 2x 262-pin SO-DIMM DDR5 4800/5600 MHz - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x Intel 2.5 Gigabit LAN - Intel Gigabit LAN - 2x HDMI 2.0b - 1x DisplayPort 1.4a - LVDS - eDP 14b (IMB-1240-WV)
